_meta.author: Ali-Hussein-dev
_meta.title: Card with Grid Pattern
_meta.description:
A minimal card component featuring a clean grid pattern of squares. The pattern creates a structured, geometric texture that's perfect for content organization and visual hierarchy.

Features
- Clean square grid pattern
- 50px x 50px grid spacing
- 3.5px stroke width
- Dark/Light mode support
- Smooth gradient overlay
- Built with shadcn/ui theme system
- Framer Motion entrance animation
